auth.label: API Key
auth.description: OpenRouter API key used with the Authorization Bearer header. Get it from https://openrouter.ai/settings/keys.

actions.name: create_chat_completion
actions.description: Create an OpenRouter chat completion through the OpenAI-compatible `/chat/completions` endpoint.

items.description: A JSON object returned by OpenRouter.

messages.description: An ordered list of conversation messages.

n.description: The number of choices to generate.

stream.description: Whether to request a streaming response. Connector actions only support false or omitted.

items.description: A JSON object returned by OpenRouter.

functions.description: A list of JSON objects returned by OpenRouter.

anyOf.description: A JSON object returned by OpenRouter.

function_call.description: Legacy function calling strategy converted to tool_choice at execution time.

additionalProperties.description: The bias value for this token.

max_tokens.description: The maximum number of output tokens.

max_completion_tokens.description: New max output token field, taking precedence over max_tokens.

top_logprobs.description: The number of top logprobs to return.

items.description: A JSON object returned by OpenRouter.

tools.description: A list of JSON objects returned by OpenRouter.

anyOf.description: A JSON object returned by OpenRouter.

response_format.description: A JSON object returned by OpenRouter.

modalities.description: List of output modalities to request.

metadata.description: A JSON object returned by OpenRouter.

provider.description: A JSON object returned by OpenRouter.

items.description: A JSON object returned by OpenRouter.

plugins.description: A list of JSON objects returned by OpenRouter.

session_id.description: Session ID used to associate requests.

parallel_tool_calls.description: Whether to allow parallel tool calls.

stream_options.description: A JSON object returned by OpenRouter.

reasoning.description: A JSON object returned by OpenRouter.

httpReferer.description: The application URL sent in the HTTP-Referer header for OpenRouter attribution and analytics.

xTitle.description: The application display name sent in the X-Title header for OpenRouter console display.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters when creating an OpenRouter chat completion.

outputSchema.description: A JSON object returned by OpenRouter.

actions.name: create_coinbase_charge
actions.description: Call OpenRouter's deprecated Coinbase charge endpoint for credits purchases. The upstream endpoint is currently deprecated and may return 410 Gone.

amount.description: The USD amount to top up.

sender.description: The wallet address that initiated the payment.

chain_id.description: The chain ID used to initiate the payment.

httpReferer.description: The application URL sent in the HTTP-Referer header for OpenRouter attribution and analytics.

xTitle.description: The application display name sent in the X-Title header for OpenRouter console display.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters when creating a Coinbase deposit order.

data.description: A JSON object returned by OpenRouter.

outputSchema.description: Returns the standard response for Coinbase charge results.

actions.name: create_message
actions.description: Create an OpenRouter Anthropic-format message through the `/messages` endpoint.

max_tokens.description: The maximum number of output tokens.

items.description: A JSON object returned by OpenRouter.

messages.description: An ordered list of Anthropic-format messages.

items.description: A JSON object returned by OpenRouter.

tools.description: A list of JSON objects returned by OpenRouter.

stream.description: Whether to request a streaming response. Connector actions only support false or omitted.

items.description: A JSON object returned by OpenRouter.
A JSON object returned by OpenRouter.

plugins.description: A list of JSON objects returned by OpenRouter.

metadata.description: A JSON object returned by OpenRouter.

output_config.description: A JSON object returned by OpenRouter.

provider.description: A JSON object returned by OpenRouter.

session_id.description: Session ID used to associate requests.

thinking.description: A JSON object returned by OpenRouter.

anyOf.description: A JSON object returned by OpenRouter.

httpReferer.description: The application URL sent in the HTTP-Referer header for OpenRouter attribution and analytics.

xTitle.description: The application display name sent in the X-Title header for OpenRouter console display.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters when creating an OpenRouter Anthropic Messages request.

outputSchema.description: A JSON object returned by OpenRouter.

actions.name: get_credits
actions.description: Get the authenticated OpenRouter credit balance summary.

inputSchema.description: This action requires no additional input parameters.

outputSchema.description: Returns the standard response for an OpenRouter credit overview.

actions.name: get_current_key
actions.description: Get metadata for the currently authenticated OpenRouter API key.

httpReferer.description: The application URL sent in the HTTP-Referer header for OpenRouter attribution and analytics.

xTitle.description: The application display name sent in the X-Title header for OpenRouter console display.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters when querying the current API key information.

data.description: A JSON object returned by OpenRouter.

outputSchema.description: Returns metadata for the current OpenRouter API key.

actions.name: get_generation
actions.description: Get request and usage metadata for a specific OpenRouter generation.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters when querying generation metadata.

data.description: A JSON object returned by OpenRouter.

outputSchema.description: Returns the standard response with generation metadata.

actions.name: get_models_count
actions.description: Get the total number of OpenRouter models, optionally filtered by output modalities.

outputModalities.description: Filter statistics by output modality, such as text, image, audio, embeddings, or all.

httpReferer.description: The application URL sent in the HTTP-Referer header for OpenRouter attribution and analytics.

xTitle.description: The application display name sent in the X-Title header for OpenRouter console display.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters when getting the number of models.

count.description: The current number of eligible models.

outputSchema.description: Returns the standard response for the number of models.

actions.name: list_available_models
actions.description: List the available OpenRouter models, or return the RSS feed when requested.

category.description: Filter the model list by use case classification.

supportedParameters.description: Filter the model list by supported parameter names. Multiple parameters can be separated by commas.

outputModalities.description: Filter the list of models by output modality, such as text, image, audio, embeddings, or all.

useRss.description: Whether to return RSS XML instead of JSON.

useRssChatLinks.description: Whether to use the chat page link instead of the model details page link when returning RSS.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters when listing available models for OpenRouter.

items.description: A JSON object returned by OpenRouter.

data.description: A list of JSON objects returned by OpenRouter.

anyOf.description: Standard OpenRouter response that returns a list of models.

rss.description: RSS XML string returned when useRss=true.

outputSchema.description: Response when listing available OpenRouter models.

actions.name: list_embedding_models
actions.description: List the embedding models available through OpenRouter.

httpReferer.description: The application URL sent in the HTTP-Referer header for OpenRouter attribution and analytics.

xTitle.description: The application display name sent in the X-Title header for OpenRouter console display.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters when listing embedding models.

items.description: A JSON object returned by OpenRouter.

data.description: A list of JSON objects returned by OpenRouter.

outputSchema.description: Standard OpenRouter response that returns a list of models.

actions.name: list_model_endpoints
actions.description: List the currently available endpoints for a specific OpenRouter model.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters when listing endpoints for a specific model.

data.description: A JSON object returned by OpenRouter.

outputSchema.description: Returns the standard response for the specified model endpoints.

actions.name: list_providers
actions.description: List the model providers currently available through OpenRouter.

inputSchema.description: This action requires no additional input parameters.

items.description: A JSON object returned by OpenRouter.

data.description: A list of JSON objects returned by OpenRouter.

outputSchema.description: Returns a standard response with a list of providers.

actions.name: list_user_models
actions.description: List models filtered by the current user's OpenRouter routing preferences, privacy settings, and guardrails.

httpReferer.description: The application URL sent in the HTTP-Referer header for OpenRouter attribution and analytics.

xTitle.description: The application display name sent in the X-Title header for OpenRouter console display.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters when listing models visible to the current user.

items.description: A JSON object returned by OpenRouter.

data.description: A list of JSON objects returned by OpenRouter.

outputSchema.description: Standard OpenRouter response that returns a list of models.

actions.name: list_zdr_endpoints
actions.description: Preview the OpenRouter endpoints that remain available under Zero Data Retention.

httpReferer.description: The application URL sent in the HTTP-Referer header for OpenRouter attribution and analytics.

xTitle.description: The application display name sent in the X-Title header for OpenRouter console display.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters when listing ZDR endpoints.

items.description: A JSON object returned by OpenRouter.

data.description: A list of JSON objects returned by OpenRouter.

outputSchema.description: Returns the standard response for ZDR endpoints.
